items.name: 10-INCH PIZZA
items.description: Delicious local pizza perfect for 1-2 people. Crispy crust and incredible toppings!

items.name: Pepperoni
items.description: The Go To, Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, and Pepperoni. You cant go wrong with a Classic.

items.name: Hawaiian
items.description: The Polarizer. Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, Bacon and Pineapple. Why not Ham? Because Bacon. That's Why.

items.name: 3 Cheese
items.description: So Cheesy Its got dad jokes. Cheddar, Provolone, Gouda, Mozza
items.simplified_description: Cheesy pizza with cheddar, provolone, gouda, and mozzarella cheeses.

items.name: Meat Lovers
items.description: Carnivores Dream. Tomato sauce, Mozzarella, Bacon, Pepperoni, Genoa Salami, Calabrese, Italian Sausage. Approved by Raptors.
items.simplified_description: Pizza loaded with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and various meats.

items.name: Buffalo Chicken ranch
items.description: Tomato Sauce, Mozzarella, Cheddar, Onions, Red Pepper, Buffalo Hot Sauce and Ranch. No Buffalo were Harmed in the process of making this pizza.
items.simplified_description: Spicy pizza with chicken, cheeses, onions, red pepper, buffalo sauce, and ranch.

items.description: Fresh crispy tenders with a side of tots, ketchup and tangy dipping sauce
items.simplified_description: Crispy chicken tenders served with tater tots, ketchup, and dipping sauce.
